violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Multiple food containers throughout kitchen area were not labeled or dated.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Food that was not in original packaging found in grocery bags with red "Thank you" logos in walk-in cooler & reach in freezers. Storing food removed from its original container or package need to be in a clean and sanitized covered container. Covers must be impervious and nonabsorbent.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Multiple food containers throughout kitchen area were not labeled or dated.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Box of single use containers on floor in dry storage room.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
